name: KGS Grounds
statHighlight: Fully wireless · access point on every pole
summary: A fully wireless camera network with a wireless access point on every pole — no trenching, full coverage.
challenge: An open recreational ground in Jogeshwari East couldn't be wired conventionally without major civil work.
solution: Konect built a fully wireless camera network with a wireless access point on every pole, covering the grounds without trenching cable.
result: Complete coverage of an open ground using wireless infrastructure — a template for sites where wiring isn't practical.
